title: Pipeline Architecture
summary: Thiet ke va implement Pipeline Architecture voi 8 steps theo Single Responsibility principle. Su dung PipelineContext lam carrier object duy nhat.

title: CLI Command Handler
summary: Implement CLI interface su dung Typer voi cac sub-commands: init, task, ask, summarize, report, dashboard.

title: Dashboard Architecture
summary: Thiet ke component structure cho Dashboard: Overview, Timeline, Task Explorer, Developer Activity, Report.

title: Prompt Compiler
summary: Implement Prompt Compiler tu dong ghep: System Prompt + Project Context + Architecture + Coding + Task + Developer Prompt.

title: AI Provider Adapter
summary: Implement AI Provider interface va adapter cho OpenAI, Claude. Su dung httpx async client.

title: Metadata Extractor
summary: Parse Metadata block tu AI response (=====ADTS===== ... =====END=====), fallback to default neu khong co.

title: Overview Dashboard
summary: Implement Overview page: stat cards, phase distribution chart, provider usage chart.

title: Event Writer
summary: Implement Event Writer luu moi event thanh file JSON rieng trong .adts/events/.

title: Cache Builder
summary: Implement Cache Builder build incremental: overview.json, timeline.json, tasks.json, developers.json.

title: CLI Init Command
summary: Implement adts init: tao .adts/ directory structure va config.yaml template.

title: Timeline View
summary: Implement Timeline vertical layout hien thi events theo thoi gian.

title: Pipeline Unit Tests
summary: Viet unit test cho tung Pipeline step, mock AI provider, target coverage 90%.
